message:
fix(command): split CLIENT NO-EVICT/NO-TOUCH/REPLY into separate validation paths

Decompose CLIENT subcommand handling to validate each independently:

- CLIENT NO-EVICT: validate arity and ON/OFF mode before returning OK
- CLIENT NO-TOUCH: validate arity and ON/OFF mode before returning OK
- CLIENT REPLY: validate arity and ON/OFF/SKIP mode before returning OK
- Add comprehensive tests for invalid modes and extra arguments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
